name: Warm Filet Mignon with Sesame Mayonnaise (Mf)
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds filet mignon trimmed of all fat and tied
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine star anise, soy sauce, garlic, brown sugar, and rice vinegar in a small skillet. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer until only 1/4 cup remains. Strain out the star anise and reserve the liquid. If using five spice powder instead of star anise, add it now.
2. Boil 3 quarts water and add beef. Cook for 15 to 18 minutes (depending on desired doneness).
3. Let the beef cool to room temperature for about 15 minutes while making the mayonnaise.
4. Mix the reserved liquid with mustard in a bowl, then stir in mayonnaise, sesame oil, half teaspoon salt, and crushed red pepper until smooth.
5. Add a small amount of water to thin the mixture if needed.
6. Slice beef vertically against the grain into 1/2-inch wide slices, then slice each into 3-inch long strips across the grain.
7. Spread mayonnaise on a dinner plate. Center a clump of watercress in the middle and arrange beef slices around it. Sprinkle with salt, pepper, and chives. Drizzle additional mayonnaise over the edges for serving or garnish
